stemHtml:
Which statements accurately describe the properties and operational characteristics of Jet A1 fuel?

1. The flash point must be a minimum of -18°C 
2. The fuel can be pumped 5–15°C below its waxing point 
3. The fuel waxing (freeze) point is −47°C and afterwards cannot be pumped 
4. Jet A1 performs better than Jet B in cold conditions 
5. Jet A1 acts as a lubricant
